name: Mcdonald's Apple Mcmuffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Skimmed or reconstituted, Non-fat dry milk
recipeInstructions:
You can use 4 tbsp yogurt and 2 tbsp applesauce for more moist muffins.
1. Grease 12 muffin wells.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
3. In a medium mixing bowl, combine all ingredients using a mixer on medium speed until well combined.
4. Stir in the self-rising flour only until it is completely moistened and dissolved. Do not overmix; you don't want to beat this like a cake batter or muffins will be heavy and possibly dry after baking.
5. Divide the batter equally among the 12 prepared muffin wells.
6. Bake for about 18-20 minutes, or until a tester comes out clean.
7. Cool for a few minutes before loosening and removing from the muffin tins.
